query: I need to add OAuth2 authentication to our Express API. We currently use JWT tokens. Let's use the PDCA framework.
We need to migrate our monolith to microservices. I want to use a systematic approach with proper test coverage.
I want to add a new billing feature to our Rails app. This is complex and I want to make sure we do it right with AI assistance.
Let's build a new API endpoint for user notifications. I want to follow TDD and keep humans in the loop.
We're refactoring our data access layer. I want structured analysis and planning before we write any code.
I need to implement a caching layer with Redis. Let's do this methodically with proper testing.
Starting a new coding session to add rate limiting. I want systematic quality control on this AI-assisted work.
We need to add multi-tenancy support to our SaaS app. Complex change — I want plan-do-check-act discipline.
I'm going to work with Claude on a production code change and want to maintain accountability and code quality.
Help me plan and implement a new search feature with proper TDD discipline and human oversight at each step.
We keep shipping bugs on this service. I want to slow down and do this properly with Claude.
I need to add Stripe integration to our checkout flow before the end of the sprint.
Our codebase has gotten really messy from AI-generated code. Let's refactor this module.
I want to rebuild our authentication system. It's been broken for a while and I don't want to make it worse.
We're getting paged every day on this endpoint. Let's fix it properly, not just patch it.
I need to migrate our database schema. There are a dozen tables involved and I'm nervous about getting it wrong.
Let's add real-time notifications. I've tried this before and it always turns into a mess.
We need to implement GDPR compliance across the user data pipeline. It's a lot of touchpoints.
I want to extract this 800-line class into something maintainable. Where do we start?
We're switching our background job system from Sidekiq to Temporal. Help me plan the migration.
What is the capital of France?
Write a fibonacci function in Python.
Explain how React hooks work.
Summarize this article for me.
What's the difference between TCP and UDP?
Translate this sentence to Spanish: 'Good morning, how are you?'
Help me debug this null pointer exception in my Java code.
What are the best practices for writing commit messages?

How do I center a div in CSS?
What does this regex pattern match?
Can you add a docstring to this function?
